posts.note: Weekend scroll. A quick tip or tool people act on.
posts.caption:
No, you don't need 20% cash to buy a condo in Singapore
The myth says you need 20% in cash. That's wrong.
A private home downpayment is 25%, but only 5% has to be cash.
The other 20% can come straight from your CPF, so the cash you actually need upfront is way smaller than people scare you into thinking.
Save this before you talk to any agent, then check your own numbers free at propsight.sg (link in bio)
